_note: Shared expectations for client-LOCAL error guides (errors a client raises itself, without a broker error frame). Each client test suite asserts that its message for a case contains every substring in must_contain, matched case-insensitively. Keeps the guided wording in parity across the Rust, TypeScript, Python, Go, and C# clients the way wire_vectors.json keeps the wire encoding in parity. Broker-side guides ride error frames and are covered by broker tests, so they are not listed here.

connection_refused.description: Raised at connect time when the TCP connection is refused (no broker listening at the address).

heartbeat_timeout.description: Raised when the broker sends no response within the heartbeat timeout window.

decode_malformed_body.description: Raised by the message decode entry point (deserialize / JSON) when the content type is set but the body cannot be decoded (e.g. content type application/json with a non-JSON body). Pins the wording across the deserialize-dispatch clients (Rust, TypeScript, Python) and the explicit-decode clients (Go, C#).
